positive: A stylized, maximalist geometric portrait of a whimsical astronaut floating among neon-illuminated, crystalline nebula patterns. The composition should feature strong central symmetry, clean silhouettes, and high contrast. Dominant colors are deep indigo, electric cyan, radiant magenta, and metallic silver, rendered with thick, bold lines suitable for screen printing. The style must emulate modern abstract pop art meets retro sci-fi illustration, featuring simplified, impactful shapes and vibrant color blocks. Overhead, the geometric elements should suggest constellations and cosmic debris. Minimalist background separation ensures the central figure pops against the dense pattern.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, multiple limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, amateur drawing, monochrome, low resolution, gradient transitions, photorealism
